CREATE TABLE hierarchy_flat_dictionary (key UInt64, parent UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT dictGetDescendants('hierarchy_flat_dictionary', 2, 1) FROM (SELECT number FROM system.numbers LIMIT 1);
SELECT dictGetDescendants('hierarchy_flat_dictionary', key, level) FROM (SELECT number AS key, 1 AS level FROM system.numbers LIMIT 1);
WITH (SELECT COUNT() FROM hierarchy_flat_dictionary) AS total_rows SELECT dictGetDescendants('hierarchy_flat_dictionary', 1, total_rows) FROM system.numbers LIMIT 1;
SELECT dictGetDescendants('hierarchy_flat_dictionary', key, 0) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT key FROM hierarchy_flat_dictionary) WHERE key = 1;
SELECT dictGetDescendants('hierarchy_flat_dictionary', 3, level) FROM (SELECT number AS level FROM system.numbers LIMIT 1) WHERE level < 3;
